mapper.select: SELECT s.store_idx AS storeIdx, best_image.image_url AS storeThumbnailUrl FROM store s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT first_menu.store_idx, first_image.image_url FROM ( SELECT ranked_menu.store_idx, ranked_menu.menu_idx FROM ( SELECT sm.store_idx, sm.menu_idx, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY sm.store_idx ORDER BY sm.display_order ASC, sm.menu_idx ASC ) AS rn FROM store_menu sm WHERE sm.menu_status = 'AVAILABLE' ) ranked_menu WHERE ranked_menu.rn = 1 ) first_menu LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ranked_image.menu_idx, ranked_image.image_url FROM ( SELECT mi.menu_idx, mi.image_url, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY mi.menu_idx ORDER BY CASE WHEN mi.is_primary = TRUE THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, mi.display_order ASC, mi.menu_image_idx ASC ) AS rn FROM menu_image mi ) ranked_image WHERE ranked_image.rn = 1 ) first_image ON first_image.menu_idx = first_menu.menu_idx ) best_image ON best_image.store_idx = s.store_idx WHERE s.store_idx = #{storeIdx}

SELECT s.store_idx AS storeIdx, best_image.image_url AS storeThumbnailUrl FROM store s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT first_menu.store_idx, first_image.image_url FROM ( SELECT ranked_menu.store_idx, ranked_menu.menu_idx FROM ( SELECT sm.store_idx, sm.menu_idx, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY sm.store_idx ORDER BY sm.display_order ASC, sm.menu_idx ASC ) AS rn FROM store_menu sm WHERE sm.menu_status = 'AVAILABLE' ) ranked_menu WHERE ranked_menu.rn = 1 ) first_menu LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ranked_image.menu_idx, ranked_image.image_url FROM ( SELECT mi.menu_idx, mi.image_url, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY mi.menu_idx ORDER BY CASE WHEN mi.is_primary = TRUE THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, mi.display_order ASC, mi.menu_image_idx ASC ) AS rn FROM menu_image mi ) ranked_image WHERE ranked_image.rn = 1 ) first_image ON first_image.menu_idx = first_menu.menu_idx ) best_image ON best_image.store_idx = s.store_idx WHERE s.store_idx IN
#{storeIdx}
